title: Overlook Terrace Apartments Reviews - Puyallup, WA
content: While the outside may not be stunning, the rent is affordable and we have had a great experience with management.

title: The Mediterranean Inn Seattle | Best Hotels In Seattle Washington
content: ## Welcome to the Mediterranean Inn. With an enviable address in the downtown Queen Anne neighborhood, the Mediterranean Inn offers spacious rooms, onsite parking and great rates, topped off by an acclaimed rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the Seattle Skyline, Space Needle, Mount Rainier, Olympic Mountains and Elliot Bay. So, come and experience Seattle’s unique sights and sounds like a local. A rooftop deck with tables, chairs, and planters overlooks modern buildings and the Space Needle in the background under a clear blue sky. A hotel room with a queen bed, two nightstands with lamps, framed art on the wall, a mirror, and a door in the background. A hotel room with a king-size bed, two bedside tables with lamps, a desk and chair, an armchair, patterned carpet, and two windows with patterned valances. A hotel room with a double bed, two wall lamps, framed artwork, an orange chair, a wooden headboard, and a door leading to the hallway.

title: Overlook Walk - 1505 Alaskan Wy, Seattle, Washington
content: Love that they made this for the water front. So easy to walk through and beautiful to take in the area. From the buildings, Ferris wheel and bay.
